text:
IT WORKS!!

Lots of tweaking with AI but soldiers are starting to move around naturally now, really cool :O

First load is a bit heavy cause it rigs 128 players, not sure how to fix that, the GLB is only 5mb though
The advantage is mine costs $3/mo and the SaaS costs $900/mo

With lots of help from 
@clarklab
 I got rigging working

My model from 
@tripoai
 was too complex for Mixamo, so he compressed / made it smaller

Now I exported the T-Pose as Soldier_TPose.fbx with the full texture etc, and exporting each animation individually like this:

I have 300 million users and 111,902 customers

The SaaS services I replaced with AI are used by all those users and customers!
